de.uka.ilkd.key.smt

Interface Query

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractQuery, ArrayFieldQuery, ConstantQuery, ExactInstanceQuery, FieldQuery, FunValueQuery, LocSetQuery, ObjectLengthQuery, ObjectTypeQuery, SeqFieldQuery, SeqLengthQuery

    interface Query
    Represents a query directed to towards the z3 solver.
    Author:
    mihai

      Returns the command that is to be handed over to the z3 solver.
